164 
SR_SPLM_PHYS_ACTV_OVRL_SCRN_IND 
LABEL: 
Screened Supplemental HRSN Physical Activity Overall Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) supplemental health related social need (HRSN) physical activity composite 
indicator. 
LONG NAME: SR_SPLM_PHYS_ACTV_OVRL_SCRN_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES:
